testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. testcase.name: verify_AccountRegTest
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Test Failed due to exception: Unable to locate element: //h2[normalize-space()='New User Signup!'] For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.45.0', revision: 'cd6a3cd cd6a3cdfca6970f62e5bc8344109d0fe0e2af05e' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [29f366f2-b7dd-4d3a-a1fa-b24e94727570, findElement {value=//h2[normalize-space()='New User Signup!'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 150.0.2, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260506140522, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.37.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 37408, moz:profile: C:\Users\ANILK~1.J\AppData\..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....} Session ID: 29f366f2-b7dd-4d3a-a1fa-b24e94727570 at testCases.AccountRegTest.verify_AccountRegTest(AccountRegTest.java:86) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ...
